news.t: Compute AI Chip Opportunities With This ETF
Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TXNU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily TXN Bull 2X ETF (TXNU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Texas Instruments Inc. (TICKER: TXN). TXNU was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: Texas Instruments Incorporated - Benchmark Price Return
